title: Domestic energy affordability support schemes in Northern Ireland: interim evaluation
body: "The domestic energy affordability support schemes for Northern Ireland were implemented from the winter of 2022 to 2023 to support households during a period of exceptional energy price rises.  The schemes in scope of this evaluation, totalling £796 million in spend, are the:   Energy Bills Support Scheme and Alternative Fuel Payment (EBSS AFP)  EBSS Alternative Funding (EBSS AF) Energy Price Guarantee (EPG)   This report covers the process and early outcome evaluations of the reports. The impact and economic evaluations will be detailed in a separate report.  See also the Domestic energy affordability support schemes in Great Britain: interim evaluation report.  "
